title: cenia turbinata
intro: Cenia turbinata, also known as the "twisted spindle tree" or "twisted tree", is a type of plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cenia turbinata include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating digestive issues, among others. The herbal preparations of Cenia turbinata include decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which can be used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
